programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programs.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programs.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programs.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programs.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programs.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programs.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programs.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programs.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programs.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.
